emails.subject: Re: Meter 1517
emails.body: Re: Meter 1517 Phillips said we shorted them gas on December 1st so they pulled it on January 1. Can we verify that we did not deliver 5,00 on Dec. 1? If that is the case and this was a firm sale, we owe him some gas at Dec Index less (.045). Which is bad! Let me know what happened in Dec before I can put this deal out in Jan. Daren J Farmer 01/09/2001 02:25 PM
